info.description: Backend API for payment sandbox simulation.
info.title: Payment Sandbox API

get.description: Admin fetches the wallet account for a merchant
Admin lists payment intents with optional status filter

patch.description: Admin updates payment intent status to SUCCESS or FAILED

get.description: Admin lists refunds with optional status filter

patch.description: Admin processes approved refund to SUCCESS or FAILED
Admin reviews refund request (APPROVE or REJECT)

get.description: Get aggregated invoice/payment/refund stats with optional filters

patch.description: Admin updates top-up status to SUCCESS or FAILED

get.description: List all OAuth2 clients owned by the merchant

post.description: Register a new OAuth2 client for the merchant

get.description: Merchant lists invoices with optional status and pagination

post.description: Merchant creates a new invoice. Requires Idempotency-Key header to safely retry on network failure.

parameters.description: Unique key per logical request (UUID recommended). Replaying the same key returns the original response; reusing the key with a different body returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

get.description: Merchant gets invoice detail by ID
Merchant lists their own refund requests

post.description: Merchant requests refund for successful payment intent. Requires Idempotency-Key header to safely retry on network failure.

parameters.description: Unique key per logical request (UUID recommended). Replaying the same key returns the original response; reusing the key with a different body returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.description: Merchant creates top-up request with pending status. Requires Idempotency-Key header to safely retry on network failure.

parameters.description: Unique key per logical request (UUID recommended). Replaying the same key returns the original response; reusing the key with a different body returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

get.description: Public endpoint to fetch invoice detail by payment link token

post.description: Public endpoint to create payment intent for an invoice token
